results.title: README + CLI docs + dashboard-plan cleanup
results.content: Updated docs/cli.md: full command reference for all 3 groups (A=quick AI: chat/review/debug/plan/qa/session/workflow, B=lifecycle: new-project/map-codebase/discuss-phase/plan-phase/execute-phase/ship/progress/next/milestone, C=utilities: todo/stats/health/note/do). Updated README.md: fixed broken links (skill_architecture.md→skill_system.md, memory.md→memory_system.md), added GUIDE.md to docs table, updated Features table (+AI Workflow Commands +Project Lifecycle +Web Dashboard), updated Key Commands section with 3 groups, added 5 Steps quick start (with lifecycle example), updated tagline, added Intelligence Roadmap link. Deleted docs/dashboard-plan.md (feature already implemented and documented in docs/dashboard.md). Build OK.

results.title: Docs refactor: split progress trackers by phase
results.content: Refactored monolithic docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md and docs/PROJECT_PROGRESS.md into an index + overview model. Added docs/progress/ with phase- and phase-part-specific markdown tables, each row linking to related requirements, design, architecture, or test docs to keep task context clean. Root docs now route readers into the relevant phase tracker instead of carrying the full backlog inline.

results.title: Archived milestone v1.0 with planning compaction
results.content: Completed the v1.0 milestone archival workflow by creating .planning/milestones/v1.0-ROADMAP.md and v1.0-REQUIREMENTS.md, collapsing ROADMAP.md to an archived-milestones index, deleting the root REQUIREMENTS.md, evolving PROJECT.md to post-ship state, updating STATE.md to milestone archived, committing as chore: archive v1.0 milestone, and tagging the repo with v1.0. This is the handoff point before starting a fresh requirements file for the next milestone.

results.title: Phase 1 task breakdown audit
results.content: Audited docs/TASK_BREAKDOWN.md against the actual minder repository state. Added a Phase 1 implementation audit, a per-task status map, a current runnable local flow section, and an explicit closure checklist. Key finding: Phase 1 is still open despite strong foundation code. Missing or partial areas are MCP transports (SSE/stdio), repo-local .minder state, standalone workflow/memory/auth/session tool modules, bootstrap scripts, docker development stack, GitHub Actions CI/release workflows, and tests/integration/test_phase1_gate.py. Also removed a stale reference to docs/PHASE2_MANUAL_TEST.md because that file does not exist in the workspace.

results.title: Docs cleanup and dynamic skill retrieval plan
results.content: Cleaned the core docs so README, docs/GUIDE.md, docs/cli.md, and the coder-cli skill now reflect the current command surface from cmd/coder/main.go and explicitly label roadmap-only commands as future design. Added docs/dynamic_skill_retrieval_plan.md proposing a phased upgrade: structured skill output for LLMs, a server-side skill resolver, session-scoped active skills, re-resolve triggers during work, and context budgeting so agents can fetch and swap skills mid-task instead of locking retrieval at submit time.
